## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] UI or UX improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Infrastructure or tooling

## Why This Change

Explain the problem being solved, the goal of the change, or the user impact.

## Screenshots Or Recordings

If this changes UI, include before or after screenshots or a short recording.

## Testing

List what you ran locally.

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:targeted`
- [ ] Manual verification

## Environment Or Schema Impact

Note any env var, schema, migration, webhook, integration, or deployment impact.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `README.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I kept this PR focused
- [ ] I used existing helpers and patterns where possible
- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] I added screenshots for UI changes

## Notes For Maintainer

Anything you want Salman to know before review.
